spec_match.rationale: Exercises a real surface of the spec's headline behaviour — caret-shape: auto | bar | block | underscore for editable elements…

interactive.rationale: Four labelled fields update a computed-style readout on focus and input.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The lede echoes the feature promise that the caret shape can vary per editable context.

edge_cases.rationale: The readout surfaces the unsupported/fallback state and invalid curly keyword rejection.

references.rationale: Page includes the chromestatus.com/feature/6106160780017664 link in the see-also section.

design_system.rationale: The raw snippet colour was replaced with shared CSS variables and controls now have associated labels.

summary: Verified with chrome-devtools-mcp 1.1.1 on Chrome Canary: focused terminal, OTP, editor, and amount fields. Computed caret-shape returned block/underscore/bar/block, invalid curly was false, and console/network were clean.
